name: LCM Memory
description: Conversation history assembly, ingest, and compaction backed by LCM.

env.name: LCM_ENABLED
env.label: LCM Enabled
env.description: Enables LCM history assembly and post-turn compaction.

env.label: LCM Summary Model
env.description: Optional model used for LCM summary generation.

capabilities.title: LCM
